description_long: This is a weathered, round-bodied ceramic vase with a wide, flared rim and a relatively narrow neck. The surface is matte and unglazed, showing a natural, earthy beige color with visible textural irregularities and rough patches. There are noticeable chips and cracks, particularly on one side, suggesting age or previous damage. The rim is uneven and slightly warped, adding to its rustic, handmade appearance. The body of the vase is bulbous, tapering gently toward the base, which is not visible but implied to be flat for stability. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding water or decorative items.
description: A rustic, beige ceramic vase with a wide, flared rim, bulbous body, and visible chips and cracks, giving it an aged, handmade look.
description_view_0: This view highlights a large chip and crack on the left side of the vase, with the uneven rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: The front view shows the vase's symmetrical, rounded body and wide opening, with minimal visible damage.
description_view_2: This angle displays the smooth, unbroken side of the vase, emphasizing its bulbous shape and natural surface texture.
description_view_3: This view reveals another area of chipping and surface wear near the base, with the rim's irregularity also apparent.
